---
title: "data exploration"
format: pdf
---

# Packages

```{r}
#| label: packages

library(tidyverse)

library(here)

library(scales)

library(lubridate)
```

# Data

```{r}
#| label: data

birds <- read.csv(here("data", "birds.csv"))

weather <- read.csv(here("data", "NOAA_daily_summaries.csv"))
```

# Cleaning Data

```{r}
#| label: cleaning-birds

birds_clean <- birds |> 
  mutate(
    observation_date = ymd(observation_date),
    month = floor_date(observation_date, unit = "month")
  ) |> 
  filter(
    e_bird_group == "Waterfowl",
    repeat_observation == "No",
    observation_date > ymd("2019-09-30"),
    observation_date < ymd("2025-10-01")
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: cleaning-weather

weather_clean <- weather |> 
  mutate(
    DATE = ymd(DATE),
    month = floor_date(DATE, unit = "month")
  ) |> 
  filter(
    DATE > ymd("2019-09-30"),
    DATE < ymd("2025-10-01")
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: joining-data-frames

bird_weather <- full_join(
  x = birds_clean,
  y = weather_clean,
  by = c("observation_date" = "DATE")) |> 
  select(c(observation_date, season, species, count, PRCP))
```


# trying visualizations
